title: Event
description: Normalized event entering the control loop. Post event-ingest, deduplicated by idempotency_key. Payloads are untrusted; the verifier and policy re-check are the authority.

schema_version.description: Semver of this schema. Producers stamp; consumers check compatibility.

event_id.description: Globally unique id assigned at ingress.

idempotency_key.description: Stable per-event key so at-least-once delivery yields at-most-once effect.

correlation_id.description: Groups related events into one incident.

source.description: Origin identifier, e.g. azure_activity_log, azure_resource_health, cost_management. CSP-neutral vocabulary.

event_type.description: Domain-neutral type, e.g. change_detected, cost_anomaly, health_degraded, drift_detected.

resource_ref.description: Optional pointer to an ontology Resource id.

payload.description: Untrusted event body. Never persisted verbatim if it may carry PII/secrets.

detected_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of first detection by the upstream signal.

ingested_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of arrival at event-ingest.

incident_correlation.description: Whether the event may derive an Incident ID. Operational work uses none and remains traceable by correlation_id.

tier.description: Tier that decided the event; null before routing.

mode.description: Autonomy mode at the time of processing.
